---
name: doc-coauthoring
description: Guide for co-authoring documentation with structured workflows
---

## Workflow

1. Create the initial document structure with placeholder text for all sections.
2. Create artifact with all section headers and brief placeholder text.
3. Review each section and replace placeholder content with final copy.
4. Generate a summary document with placeholder entries for missing data.
5. Add placeholder values for configuration fields that need user input.
